title: Localize core set into priority language #2 (safety-accuracy reviewed)
context: Reaching the ≥3 languages success metric requires a second non-English locale. Priority language #2 is determined by partner context (low-resource languages where WASH need is greatest take precedence). This task mirrors l10n-020 for the second priority language: translate the full core medium-risk set with safety-accuracy review, not just fluency. It depends on the i18n framework (i18n-019) and the full medium-risk content set (content-012).
objective: Translate the complete core medium-risk WASH content set into priority language #2, with every translation reviewed by a competent speaker who checks both fluency and safety accuracy (numbers, step order, key protective-behavior terms, disclaimer text) — mirroring the process of l10n-020 for the second priority language.
acceptanceCriteria: All medium-risk WashUnit content (content-006 through content-012) is translated into priority language #2 and committed as locale catalog entries conforming to the i18n framework (i18n-019)
Every translation is reviewed by a competent speaker of priority language #2 who verifies both fluency and safety accuracy (numbers, step order, key protective-behavior terms, disclaimer text)
Safety-accuracy review is documented: a PR-tied review-log entry records which content was reviewed, by whom, and that both fluency and safety accuracy were checked
Translated disclaimer text preserves the 'informational, not a substitute for professional care' framing in the target language
Source attribution is preserved in the translated output
Build-time i18n completeness check passes for priority language #2; no verbatim copied source text; reviewed and approved by a translation+safety reviewer distinct from the translator
If priority language #2 requires RTL layout, RTL support in the i18n framework is exercised and confirmed working
output: A committed locale catalog for priority language #2 covering all core medium-risk content, with documented safety-accuracy review and PR-tied review-log entries.
